_comment: Pedersen et al. PRL 120, 165501 (2018) Kob-Andersen binary LJ — smoke-scale single-temperature run for the Quickstart guide. N=200 (160 A + 40 B), single state point at the paper's Tm (T=1.0, rho=1.2), 5000 production steps; finishes in well under a minute on an RTX 5060 Laptop. The full 3-temperature campaign lives at configs/plan_pedersen_kalj.json. Use this file as the canonical 'copy-and-adapt' starting point when wiring a new binary-LJ paper.
_paper_ref: Pedersen et al., Phys. Rev. Lett. 120, 165501 (2018)

campaign.notes: smoke: single state point at paper Tm=1.028; demonstrates the 8-step force + 9-step integrator extension end-to-end with FD-balanced thermostat at T=1.0
